title: Solana Containerised Testbed v0.4.0: Dedicated KVM Multi-Node Kubernetes Deployment
description: Version 0.4.0 validates the Solana Kubernetes Observability Core on a dedicated KVM-based multi-node Kubernetes cluster. The release includes kubeadm-based Kubernetes deployment, containerd runtime, Calico CNI, local-path storage, Ansible automation, workload placement for validator and observability components, RPC validation, metrics validation, and wallet transfer telemetry evidence.
